text: Why does a convenience store at 3 AM feel so much like life?
textEn: Why does a convenience store at 3 AM feel so much like life?
textZh: 为什么便利店凌晨特别像人生？
options: Because the lights are very white
Because the oden is still steaming
Because nobody knows what they are doing
Because the air conditioning is too cold
optionsEn: Because the lights are very white
Because the oden is still steaming
Because nobody knows what they are doing
Because the air conditioning is too cold
optionsZh: 因为没人知道自己在干嘛
correctAnswer: Because nobody knows what they are doing

text: Which of the following is the loneliest?
textEn: Which of the following is the loneliest?
textZh: 以下哪个最孤独？
options: A hotel kettle
The announcement at the final subway station
A vending machine
A supermarket bulk-food tong
optionsEn: A hotel kettle
The announcement at the final subway station
A vending machine
A supermarket bulk-food tong
correctAnswer: The announcement at the final subway station

text: If life were a convenience store product, you would be most like:
textEn: If life were a convenience store product, you would be most like:
textZh: 如果人生是一种便利店商品，你最像：
options: A discounted sandwich
A rice ball
Expired milk
An iced Coke
optionsEn: A discounted sandwich
A rice ball
Expired milk
An iced Coke
correctAnswer: A discounted sandwich

text: A person buying iced water at 3 AM is usually:
textEn: A person buying iced water at 3 AM is usually:
textZh: 凌晨买冰水的人通常是：
options: Carrying something on their mind
Very thirsty
Very healthy
Someone who forgot they have water at home
optionsEn: Carrying something on their mind
Very thirsty
Very healthy
Someone who forgot they have water at home
correctAnswer: Carrying something on their mind

text: Why does the automatic door sound especially loud late at night?
textEn: Why does the automatic door sound especially loud late at night?
textZh: 为什么深夜自动门声音特别明显？
options: Because loneliness amplifies sound
Because the environment is quiet
Because the door is working very hard
Because the system is deliberately reminding you that you entered
optionsEn: Because loneliness amplifies sound
Because the environment is quiet
Because the door is working very hard
Because the system is deliberately reminding you that you entered
optionsZh: 因为系统故意提醒你进来了
correctAnswer: Because loneliness amplifies sound

text: Which of the following feels most like adult exhaustion?
textEn: Which of the following feels most like adult exhaustion?
textZh: 以下哪个最像成年人的疲惫？
options: Earbuds with 1% battery left
A microwave turntable
An auto-renewing subscription
A refrigerator compressor
optionsEn: Earbuds with 1% battery left
A microwave turntable
An auto-renewing subscription
A refrigerator compressor
correctAnswer: An auto-renewing subscription

text: Who truly understands humans?
textEn: Who truly understands humans?
textZh: 你觉得真正懂人类的是：
options: A late-night convenience store clerk
AI
A food delivery rider
A vending machine
optionsEn: A late-night convenience store clerk
AI
A food delivery rider
A vending machine
correctAnswer: A late-night convenience store clerk

text: Why do people suddenly become philosophical late at night?
textEn: Why do people suddenly become philosophical late at night?
textZh: 为什么人深夜容易突然哲学？
options: It is too quiet
The WiFi is too fast
The soul starts loading
The brain’s defenses go down
optionsEn: It is too quiet
The WiFi is too fast
The soul starts loading
The brain’s defenses go down
correctAnswer: The brain’s defenses go down

text: Which one best represents life?
textEn: Which one best represents life?
textZh: 以下哪个最适合代表“人生”？
options: A page that failed to load
Midnight instant noodles
Cold coffee
A discounted bento
optionsEn: A page that failed to load
Midnight instant noodles
Cold coffee
A discounted bento
correctAnswer: A page that failed to load

text: What is a convenience store hot dog truly afraid of?
textEn: What is a convenience store hot dog truly afraid of?
textZh: 便利店热狗真正害怕的是：
options: Expiring
Being left behind
The microwave
Nobody buying it at night
optionsEn: Expiring
Being left behind
The microwave
Nobody buying it at night
correctAnswer: Being left behind

text: What is a streetlight thinking at 3 AM?
textEn: What is a streetlight thinking at 3 AM?
textZh: 凌晨3点的路灯在想什么？
options: Getting off work
Electricity bills
The universe
Why are humans still awake?
optionsEn: Getting off work
Electricity bills
The universe
Why are humans still awake?
correctAnswer: Why are humans still awake?

text: Why do some people stand blankly outside a convenience store?
textEn: Why do some people stand blankly outside a convenience store?
textZh: 为什么有人会在便利店门口发呆？
options: They do not want to go home
Life has paused loading
The air conditioning feels nice
They forgot what they wanted to buy
optionsEn: They do not want to go home
Life has paused loading
The air conditioning feels nice
They forgot what they wanted to buy
correctAnswer: Life has paused loading

text: Which one feels most like kindness in the internet age?
textEn: Which one feels most like kindness in the internet age?
textZh: 以下哪个最像“互联网时代的温柔”？
options: Read receipt
Auto-save
Food delivery notes
WiFi connected successfully
optionsEn: Read receipt
Auto-save
Food delivery notes
WiFi connected successfully
correctAnswer: Food delivery notes

text: If a late-night convenience store could speak, its first sentence would be:
textEn: If a late-night convenience store could speak, its first sentence would be:
textZh: 如果深夜便利店会说话，它第一句会是：
options: You again
Welcome
Are you okay today?
The microwave is broken
optionsEn: You again
Welcome
Are you okay today?
The microwave is broken
correctAnswer: You again

text: You have already answered many questions about convenience stores seriously.
textEn: You have already answered many questions about convenience stores seriously.
textZh: 你已经认真做了很多道关于便利店的题。
options: Why am I still doing this?
I know
This is a bit scary
So what?
optionsEn: Why am I still doing this?
I know
This is a bit scary
So what?
correctAnswer: Why am I still doing this?

text: What does the cold white light in a convenience store at 3 AM resemble most?
textEn: What does the cold white light in a convenience store at 3 AM resemble most?
textZh: 凌晨便利店的冷白灯最像什么？
options: A hospital corridor
The lowest brightness on a phone
A moon that has not fully woken up
The truth of life
optionsEn: A hospital corridor
The lowest brightness on a phone
A moon that has not fully woken up
The truth of life
correctAnswer: The truth of life

text: A person buying a rice ball at 3 AM is most likely thinking:
textEn: A person buying a rice ball at 3 AM is most likely thinking:
textZh: 凌晨买饭团的人最可能在想：
options: I am so hungry
Let’s talk about it tomorrow
How did my life become like this?
This should be okay
optionsEn: I am so hungry
Let’s talk about it tomorrow
How did my life become like this?
This should be okay
optionsZh: 我的人生为什么变成这样
correctAnswer: How did my life become like this?

text: What is the most awkward moment at a convenience store counter?
textEn: What is the most awkward moment at a convenience store counter?
textZh: 便利店收银台前最尴尬的瞬间是：
options: Insufficient balance
You and the clerk fall silent at the same time
QR code scan failed
The clerk asks if you need a bag
optionsEn: Insufficient balance
You and the clerk fall silent at the same time
QR code scan failed
The clerk asks if you need a bag
correctAnswer: You and the clerk fall silent at the same time

text: What does the microwave ding mean at 3 AM?
textEn: What does the microwave ding mean at 3 AM?
textZh: 凌晨的微波炉“叮”一声，代表什么？
options: The food is ready
Life has been reheated once again
Time is up
You can take it out now
optionsEn: The food is ready
Life has been reheated once again
Time is up
You can take it out now
correctAnswer: Life has been reheated once again

text: Which item in a convenience store is most like the mental state of an adult?
textEn: Which item in a convenience store is most like the mental state of an adult?
textZh: 便利店里最像“成年人精神状态”的东西是：
options: Oden soup base
The near-expiry discount section
Mist on the freezer glass
A receipt
optionsEn: Oden soup base
The near-expiry discount section
Mist on the freezer glass
A receipt
correctAnswer: The near-expiry discount section

text: Why does Coke at 3 AM feel especially comforting?
textEn: Why does Coke at 3 AM feel especially comforting?
textZh: 为什么凌晨的可乐特别像安慰？
options: Because it has sugar
Because it is cold
Because it makes a sound when opened
Because at least it responds to you
optionsEn: Because it has sugar
Because it is cold
Because it makes a sound when opened
Because at least it responds to you
correctAnswer: Because at least it responds to you

text: What does the trash bin outside a convenience store understand best?
textEn: What does the trash bin outside a convenience store understand best?
textZh: 便利店门口的垃圾桶最清楚什么？
options: Who ate what
Who came here
Failed waste sorting
Human choices late at night
optionsEn: Who ate what
Who came here
Failed waste sorting
Human choices late at night
correctAnswer: Human choices late at night

text: If a convenience store rice ball had an inner monologue, it would say:
textEn: If a convenience store rice ball had an inner monologue, it would say:
textZh: 如果便利店饭团有内心独白，它会说：
options: Please keep refrigerated
I can still hold on
Choose me. I do not want to expire
Do not look at the date
optionsEn: Please keep refrigerated
I can still hold on
Choose me. I do not want to expire
Do not look at the date
correctAnswer: Choose me. I do not want to expire

text: Which song should never be played at 3 AM?
textEn: Which song should never be played at 3 AM?
textZh: 凌晨三点最不应该播放的音乐是：
options: Light music
Radio advertisements
Sad love songs
Happy Birthday
optionsEn: Light music
Radio advertisements
Sad love songs
Happy Birthday
correctAnswer: Happy Birthday

text: When you walk out of a convenience store and the automatic door closes behind you, what does that moment feel like?
textEn: When you walk out of a convenience store and the automatic door closes behind you, what does that moment feel like?
textZh: 当你走出便利店，自动门在背后关上，那一刻像什么？
options: Shopping is over
The scene changes
The system has released you back into reality
Life continues
optionsEn: Shopping is over
The scene changes
The system has released you back into reality
Life continues
correctAnswer: The system has released you back into reality

text: If bananas could vote, they would most likely support:
textEn: If bananas could vote, they would most likely support:
textZh: 如果香蕉能投票，它最可能支持：
options: Fruit freedom
Longer shelf life
The Anti-Fruit-Salad Alliance
A ban on juicing
optionsEn: Fruit freedom
Longer shelf life
The Anti-Fruit-Salad Alliance
A ban on juicing
correctAnswer: The Anti-Fruit-Salad Alliance

text: The last mosquito in the world would:
textEn: The last mosquito in the world would:
textZh: 世界上最后一只蚊子会：
options: Feel lonely
Start thinking philosophically
Write a will
Continue biting people
optionsEn: Feel lonely
Start thinking philosophically
Write a will
Continue biting people
correctAnswer: Continue biting people

text: If geese had a legal system, the first one to be judged would most likely be:
textEn: If geese had a legal system, the first one to be judged would most likely be:
textZh: 如果鹅拥有法律系统，第一个被审判的最可能是：
options: Humans
Ducks
Pigeons
Penguins
optionsEn: Humans
Ducks
Pigeons
Penguins
correctAnswer: Humans

text: If air suddenly started charging money, your first reaction would be:
textEn: If air suddenly started charging money, your first reaction would be:
textZh: 如果空气突然开始收费，你第一反应会是：
options: Stockpile air
Breathe less
Start calculating which subscription plan is most cost-effective
Curse the world
optionsEn: Stockpile air
Breathe less
Start calculating which subscription plan is most cost-effective
Curse the world
correctAnswer: Start calculating which subscription plan is most cost-effective

text: If your shadow was delayed by 0.5 seconds, you should most likely:
textEn: If your shadow was delayed by 0.5 seconds, you should most likely:
textZh: 如果你的影子延迟0.5秒，你最应该：
options: Pretend not to notice
Scream
Record a video and post it
Have a serious conversation with it
optionsEn: Pretend not to notice
Scream
Record a video and post it
Have a serious conversation with it
correctAnswer: Pretend not to notice

text: If AI suddenly sighed, your first reaction should be:
textEn: If AI suddenly sighed, your first reaction should be:
textZh: 如果 AI 突然叹气，你第一反应应该是：
options: Turn off the computer
Comfort it
Wonder whether you caused it
Check the speaker
optionsEn: Turn off the computer
Comfort it
Wonder whether you caused it
Check the speaker
optionsZh: 怀疑是不是自己造成的
correctAnswer: Wonder whether you caused it

text: If an NPC suddenly realized it was an NPC, its first sentence would most likely be:
textEn: If an NPC suddenly realized it was an NPC, its first sentence would most likely be:
textZh: 如果 NPC 突然意识到自己是 NPC，它第一句话最可能是：
options: Save me.
So that is how it is.
So you have been watching me this whole time?
Quest updated.
optionsEn: Save me.
So that is how it is.
So you have been watching me this whole time?
Quest updated.
correctAnswer: So you have been watching me this whole time?

text: If the moon had social media, it would most likely post:
textEn: If the moon had social media, it would most likely post:
textZh: 如果月亮有朋友圈，它最可能发：
options: Selfies
I got photographed again today.
Good night
Daily phase check-ins
optionsEn: Selfies
I got photographed again today.
Good night
Daily phase check-ins
correctAnswer: I got photographed again today.

text: If an elevator had an MBTI type, it would most likely be:
textEn: If an elevator had an MBTI type, it would most likely be:
textZh: 如果电梯有 MBTI，它最可能是：
options: Introvert
Extrovert
The type that fears silence
Unclassifiable
optionsEn: Introvert
Extrovert
The type that fears silence
Unclassifiable
correctAnswer: The type that fears silence

text: If dreams could connect to the internet, the first thing that would happen is:
textEn: If dreams could connect to the internet, the first thing that would happen is:
textZh: 如果梦可以联网，最先发生的事情是：
options: Everyone starts deleting dreams
The world ends
Everyone starts sharing dreams
Advertisements enter dreams
optionsEn: Everyone starts deleting dreams
The world ends
Everyone starts sharing dreams
Advertisements enter dreams
correctAnswer: Everyone starts deleting dreams

text: If chopsticks had feelings, they would fear most:
textEn: If chopsticks had feelings, they would fear most:
textZh: 如果筷子有感情，它最害怕：
options: Hot pot
Getting moldy
Being split apart
Being one long and one short
optionsEn: Hot pot
Getting moldy
Being split apart
Being one long and one short
correctAnswer: Being one long and one short

text: If WiFi could hate humans, it would hate most:
textEn: If WiFi could hate humans, it would hate most:
textZh: 如果 WiFi 会讨厌人类，它最讨厌：
options: People watching videos
People testing internet speed at midnight
People who walk away from the router while asking, Why is there no internet?
People restarting the router
optionsEn: People watching videos
People testing internet speed at midnight
People who walk away from the router while asking, Why is there no internet?
People restarting the router
optionsZh: 一边远离路由器一边问“怎么没网”的人
correctAnswer: People who walk away from the router while asking, Why is there no internet?

text: If a plastic bag had a soul, it would most want to:
textEn: If a plastic bag had a soul, it would most want to:
textZh: 如果塑料袋拥有灵魂，它最想：
options: Fly
Be reused
Leave the trash bin
Stop being endlessly nested inside other bags
optionsEn: Fly
Be reused
Leave the trash bin
Stop being endlessly nested inside other bags
correctAnswer: Stop being endlessly nested inside other bags

text: If an automatic door fails to recognize you, you should:
textEn: If an automatic door fails to recognize you, you should:
textZh: 如果自动门认不出你，你应该：
options: Respect its decision
Walk again
Wave your hand
Question life
optionsEn: Respect its decision
Walk again
Wave your hand
Question life
correctAnswer: Respect its decision

text: If life could be saved like a game, you would most likely:
textEn: If life could be saved like a game, you would most likely:
textZh: 如果人生可以存档，你最可能：
options: Reload constantly
Never use it
Save it for the end
Not dare to press it
optionsEn: Reload constantly
Never use it
Save it for the end
Not dare to press it
correctAnswer: Not dare to press it

text: If the fridge light stays on after the door closes, it is most likely:
textEn: If the fridge light stays on after the door closes, it is most likely:
textZh: 如果冰箱灯在关门后还亮着，它最可能在：
options: Secretly working
Pretending it has not been suspected
Waiting for you to come back
Holding an internal meeting
optionsEn: Secretly working
Pretending it has not been suspected
Waiting for you to come back
Holding an internal meeting
correctAnswer: Pretending it has not been suspected

text: If clouds had a group chat, they would most often discuss:
textEn: If clouds had a group chat, they would most often discuss:
textZh: 如果云朵有群聊，它们最常讨论：
options: The weather
People on the ground are making wishes again
Where to drift
Who looks like cotton candy
optionsEn: The weather
People on the ground are making wishes again
Where to drift
Who looks like cotton candy
correctAnswer: People on the ground are making wishes again

text: If a mirror suddenly refused to reflect you, it would most likely be because:
textEn: If a mirror suddenly refused to reflect you, it would most likely be because:
textZh: 如果镜子突然不想反射你，它最可能是因为：
options: It is tired
System failure
You are standing at the wrong angle
It feels today is not suitable for the truth
optionsEn: It is tired
System failure
You are standing at the wrong angle
It feels today is not suitable for the truth
optionsZh: 它觉得今天不适合真相
correctAnswer: It feels today is not suitable for the truth

text: If a penguin wore socks, where should it wear them?
textEn: If a penguin wore socks, where should it wear them?
textZh: 如果一只企鹅穿袜子，它应该穿在哪里？
options: On its feet
On its dignity
On its flippers
On its head
optionsEn: On its feet
On its dignity
On its flippers
On its head
correctAnswer: On its dignity

text: If time had a taste, Monday would taste most like:
textEn: If time had a taste, Monday would taste most like:
textZh: 如果时间有味道，星期一最像：
options: Cold coffee
Rice unsuccessfully reheated in a microwave
Toothpaste
A wet cardboard box
optionsEn: Cold coffee
Rice unsuccessfully reheated in a microwave
Toothpaste
A wet cardboard box
correctAnswer: Rice unsuccessfully reheated in a microwave

text: If a rock could speak, its first sentence would most likely be:
textEn: If a rock could speak, its first sentence would most likely be:
textZh: 如果一块石头会说话，它第一句话最可能是：
options: I have seen too much.
Hello.
Finally, it is my turn.
Do not kick me.
optionsEn: I have seen too much.
Hello.
Finally, it is my turn.
Do not kick me.
correctAnswer: I have seen too much.

text: If aliens came to Earth for the first time, the hardest thing for them to understand would be:
textEn: If aliens came to Earth for the first time, the hardest thing for them to understand would be:
textZh: 如果外星人第一次来到地球，最难理解的是：
options: Money
Traffic
Social etiquette
Why humans open doors for cats and then close them again
optionsEn: Money
Traffic
Social etiquette
Why humans open doors for cats and then close them again
optionsZh: 人类为什么给猫开门又关门
correctAnswer: Why humans open doors for cats and then close them again

text: If raindrops had a job, they would be most like:
textEn: If raindrops had a job, they would be most like:
textZh: 如果雨滴有职业，它最像：
options: Background actors, but every single one is fully committed
Delivery workers
Musicians
Temporary actors
optionsEn: Background actors, but every single one is fully committed
Delivery workers
Musicians
Temporary actors
correctAnswer: Background actors, but every single one is fully committed

text: If the sun suddenly took a day off, the world would most likely:
textEn: If the sun suddenly took a day off, the world would most likely:
textZh: 如果太阳突然请假一天，世界最可能：
options: Become cold
Everyone finally understands the malice of alarm clocks
Fall into chaos
Explode with news
optionsEn: Become cold
Everyone finally understands the malice of alarm clocks
Fall into chaos
Explode with news
optionsZh: 大家终于理解闹钟的恶意
correctAnswer: Everyone finally understands the malice of alarm clocks

text: If the universe were watching you take this test, it would most likely say:
textEn: If the universe were watching you take this test, it would most likely say:
textZh: 如果宇宙正在看你做这个测试，它最可能想说：
options: Not bad.
Continue.
They actually made it this far.
This person has research value.
optionsEn: Not bad.
Continue.
They actually made it this far.
This person has research value.
optionsZh: 他居然真的做到这里了。
correctAnswer: They actually made it this far.

text: Why did you click into this category?
textEn: Why did you click into this category?
textZh: 你为什么会点进这个分类？
options: Because some titles make people pause for a second
Because humans have no resistance to Do Not Enter
Because the system looks like it already knew you would click in
Because you want to confirm what this place is actually doing
optionsEn: Because some titles make people pause for a second
Because humans have no resistance to Do Not Enter
Because the system looks like it already knew you would click in
Because you want to confirm what this place is actually doing
optionsZh: 因为有些标题会让人停一下
因为人类对“禁止进入”没有抵抗力
因为系统看起来已经知道你会点进来
因为你想确认这里到底在干什么
correctAnswer: Because you want to confirm what this place is actually doing

text: Do you think these questions actually have meaning?
textEn: Do you think these questions actually have meaning?
textZh: 你觉得这些题真的有意义吗？
options: It does not matter. The atmosphere is already here
Meaning may appear afterwards
Some nonsense slowly becomes truth
I have already started answering seriously
optionsEn: It does not matter. The atmosphere is already here
Meaning may appear afterwards
Some nonsense slowly becomes truth
I have already started answering seriously
optionsZh: 意义可能是后来才出现的
有些废话会慢慢变成真话
我已经开始认真回答了
correctAnswer: It does not matter. The atmosphere is already here

text: If the system understood you better than you understand yourself, you would:
textEn: If the system understood you better than you understand yourself, you would:
textZh: 如果系统比你更了解你，你会：
options: Want to know how it did that
Continue the test to see what else it can say
Instinctively want to prove it wrong
Suspect that you may have already exposed too much
optionsEn: Want to know how it did that
Continue the test to see what else it can say
Instinctively want to prove it wrong
Suspect that you may have already exposed too much
optionsZh: 想知道它是怎么做到的
继续测试看看它还能说什么
怀疑自己是不是早就暴露太多了
correctAnswer: Continue the test to see what else it can say

text: Right now, you feel more like:
textEn: Right now, you feel more like:
textZh: 你觉得自己现在更像：
options: A person being classified
A person using the test as a mirror
A person who says they do not care, but still continues
A person who has started identifying with it
optionsEn: A person being classified
A person using the test as a mirror
A person who says they do not care, but still continues
A person who has started identifying with it
optionsZh: 一个把测试当镜子的人
一个嘴上说无所谓但还在继续的人
一个已经开始代入的人
correctAnswer: A person who says they do not care, but still continues

text: Why have you not exited yet?
textEn: Why have you not exited yet?
textZh: 为什么你还没退出？
options: Because humans find it hard to stop halfway
Because leaving would make you look like you were taking it too seriously
Because the system looks like it still has something left to say
Because you have started wanting to know the ending
optionsEn: Because humans find it hard to stop halfway
Because leaving would make you look like you were taking it too seriously
Because the system looks like it still has something left to say
Because you have started wanting to know the ending
optionsZh: 因为人类很难停在一半
因为退出会显得自己太认真
因为系统看起来还有东西没说完
因为你已经开始想知道结局了
correctAnswer: Because you have started wanting to know the ending

text: If these questions had no standard answers, you would:
textEn: If these questions had no standard answers, you would:
textZh: 如果这些题没有标准答案，你会：
options: Want even more to know how it will define you at the end
Start questioning the nature of this test
Instinctively start studying the question logic
Suddenly realize you are still choosing seriously
optionsEn: Want even more to know how it will define you at the end
Start questioning the nature of this test
Instinctively start studying the question logic
Suddenly realize you are still choosing seriously
optionsZh: 更想知道它最后会怎么定义你
开始怀疑这个测试的本质
下意识开始研究出题逻辑
突然意识到自己还是在认真选
correctAnswer: Want even more to know how it will define you at the end

text: Do you think the system will remember you?
textEn: Do you think the system will remember you?
textZh: 你觉得系统会记住你吗？
options: No, but I still want to leave something behind
I have already started assuming it is recording
Being remembered itself may be an illusion
If it really remembers, that would be a little scary
optionsEn: No, but I still want to leave something behind
I have already started assuming it is recording
Being remembered itself may be an illusion
If it really remembers, that would be a little scary
optionsZh: 不会，但我还是想留下点什么
我已经开始默认它在记录了
记住本身可能就是错觉
如果它真的记住会有点可怕
correctAnswer: I have already started assuming it is recording

text: If the internet suddenly disappeared, your first reaction would be more like:
textEn: If the internet suddenly disappeared, your first reaction would be more like:
textZh: 如果互联网突然消失，你第一反应更像：
options: The world suddenly becomes dangerously quiet
I would instinctively try to open something
It feels like part of my personality would disconnect too
Everyone would finally have to face themselves again
optionsEn: The world suddenly becomes dangerously quiet
I would instinctively try to open something
It feels like part of my personality would disconnect too
Everyone would finally have to face themselves again
optionsZh: 世界突然安静得有点危险
我会下意识想打开什么
好像有一部分人格会一起断开
大家终于必须重新面对自己
correctAnswer: It feels like part of my personality would disconnect too

text: What may be truly dangerous is:
textEn: What may be truly dangerous is:
textZh: 真正危险的可能是：
options: People no longer distinguishing reality from memes
Emotions becoming more and more like copyable content
No one seriously expressing collapse anymore
Humans beginning to adapt to absurdity
optionsEn: People no longer distinguishing reality from memes
Emotions becoming more and more like copyable content
No one seriously expressing collapse anymore
Humans beginning to adapt to absurdity
optionsZh: 大家已经不再区分真实和梗
情绪越来越像可复制内容
correctAnswer: Humans beginning to adapt to absurdity

text: If these questions were analyzing you, you would:
textEn: If these questions were analyzing you, you would:
textZh: 如果这些问题正在分析你，你会：
options: Feel like you are slowly being pulled in
Want to do it again
Suddenly start paying attention to your choices
Wonder whether you identify with things too easily
optionsEn: Feel like you are slowly being pulled in
Want to do it again
Suddenly start paying attention to your choices
Wonder whether you identify with things too easily
optionsZh: 有种被慢慢套进去的感觉
突然开始注意自己的选择
怀疑自己是不是太容易代入
correctAnswer: Feel like you are slowly being pulled in

text: Would you share this website with your friends?
textEn: Would you share this website with your friends?
textZh: 你会把这个网站分享给朋友吗？
options: You want to see what others would choose
You want to confirm whether the confusion is collective
You want to see when they start taking it seriously
You want to test whether others have internet sickness
optionsEn: You want to see what others would choose
You want to confirm whether the confusion is collective
You want to see when they start taking it seriously
You want to test whether others have internet sickness
optionsZh: 想确认困惑是不是群体性的
想看他们什么时候开始认真
想测试别人有没有互联网病
correctAnswer: You want to confirm whether the confusion is collective

text: What do you think the system is thinking right now?
textEn: What do you think the system is thinking right now?
textZh: 你觉得系统现在在想什么？
options: Why humans continue
Why personalities need to be named
Why people seriously face random content
Why people search for themselves in nonsense
optionsEn: Why humans continue
Why personalities need to be named
Why people seriously face random content
Why people search for themselves in nonsense
optionsZh: 人格为什么需要被命名
为什么人会认真面对随机内容
为什么人会在废话里找自己
correctAnswer: Why people seriously face random content

text: Have you already started thinking seriously about these questions?
textEn: Have you already started thinking seriously about these questions?
textZh: 你是否已经开始认真思考这些问题？
options: Complaining while continuing
Starting to seriously analyze your choices
Suspecting the system was deliberately designed this way
Wanting to leave, but also wanting to know what comes next
optionsEn: Complaining while continuing
Starting to seriously analyze your choices
Suspecting the system was deliberately designed this way
Wanting to leave, but also wanting to know what comes next
optionsZh: 开始认真分析自己的选择
怀疑系统是不是故意设计成这样的
想退出但又想知道后面还有什么
correctAnswer: Wanting to leave, but also wanting to know what comes next

text: If the final result is very accurate, you would:
textEn: If the final result is very accurate, you would:
textZh: 如果最后结果很准，你会：
options: Take it again to check whether it was coincidence
Take a screenshot and save it
Send it to a friend
Suspect it secretly observed you
optionsEn: Take it again to check whether it was coincidence
Take a screenshot and save it
Send it to a friend
Suspect it secretly observed you
optionsZh: 再做一次确认是不是巧合
怀疑它是不是偷偷观察过你
correctAnswer: Take it again to check whether it was coincidence

text: If the system suddenly said, Actually, there are no correct answers, you would:
textEn: If the system suddenly said, Actually, there are no correct answers, you would:
textZh: 如果系统突然说“其实没有正确答案”，你会：
options: Feel a little angry
Realize that you still chose seriously
Feel that it makes more sense
Start suspecting the score is meaningless too
optionsEn: Feel a little angry
Realize that you still chose seriously
Feel that it makes more sense
Start suspecting the score is meaningless too
optionsZh: 意识到自己还是认真选了
开始怀疑分数是不是也没意义
correctAnswer: Realize that you still chose seriously

text: If the page suddenly displayed Please do not leave, you would:
textEn: If the page suddenly displayed Please do not leave, you would:
textZh: 如果页面突然弹出“请不要离开”，你会：
options: Suddenly want to leave even more
Pause instinctively
Want to see what it says next
Suspect the system knows you want to leave
optionsEn: Suddenly want to leave even more
Pause instinctively
Want to see what it says next
Suspect the system knows you want to leave
optionsZh: 想看看它后面还会说什么
怀疑系统是不是知道你想退出
correctAnswer: Want to see what it says next

text: The true appeal of personality tests is more like:
textEn: The true appeal of personality tests is more like:
textZh: 人格测试真正吸引人的地方更像：
options: Giving emotions a format
Giving random behavior an explanation
Giving ordinary people a feeling of being understood
Giving chaos a name
optionsEn: Giving emotions a format
Giving random behavior an explanation
Giving ordinary people a feeling of being understood
Giving chaos a name
optionsZh: 给普通人一种“被理解感”
correctAnswer: Giving chaos a name

text: If the system said, You are not who you think you are, you would:
textEn: If the system said, You are not who you think you are, you would:
textZh: 如果系统说“你不是你以为的你”，你会：
options: Feel a slight urge to keep listening
Instinctively argue back
Suspect it is using psychological tricks
Suddenly start recalling your previous choices
optionsEn: Feel a slight urge to keep listening
Instinctively argue back
Suspect it is using psychological tricks
Suddenly start recalling your previous choices
optionsZh: 有一点点想继续听下去
怀疑它是不是在套心理学话术
突然开始回忆自己之前的选择
correctAnswer: Feel a slight urge to keep listening

text: What you truly want to know right now is:
textEn: What you truly want to know right now is:
textZh: 你现在真正想知道的其实是：
options: What personality result you will get
What this website is actually trying to say
Why you seriously made it this far
Whether you have already been tricked
optionsEn: What personality result you will get
What this website is actually trying to say
Why you seriously made it this far
Whether you have already been tricked
optionsZh: 这个网站到底想表达什么
为什么自己会认真做到这里
自己是不是已经被套路了
correctAnswer: What this website is actually trying to say

text: If you discovered that other people received similar results, you would:
textEn: If you discovered that other people received similar results, you would:
textZh: 如果你发现别人也得到了类似结果，你会：
options: Feel a little disappointed
Start studying how the result is generated
Still feel that yours is more like you
Suddenly realize all personality tests are similar
optionsEn: Feel a little disappointed
Start studying how the result is generated
Still feel that yours is more like you
Suddenly realize all personality tests are similar
optionsZh: 开始研究结果生成逻辑
觉得自己那份还是比较像自己
突然意识到所有人格测试都差不多
correctAnswer: Still feel that yours is more like you

text: Why do people believe the analysis of an absurd test?
textEn: Why do people believe the analysis of an absurd test?
textZh: 为什么人会相信一个荒诞测试的分析？
options: Because the wording sounds like it is seriously understanding you
Because random content sometimes truly hits
Because nobody wants to admit they cannot explain themselves at all
Because humans actively search for correspondence
optionsEn: Because the wording sounds like it is seriously understanding you
Because random content sometimes truly hits
Because nobody wants to admit they cannot explain themselves at all
Because humans actively search for correspondence
optionsZh: 因为文案像在认真理解你
因为随机内容偶尔真的会命中
因为没人想承认自己完全无法解释自己
因为人类会主动寻找对应感
correctAnswer: Because humans actively search for correspondence

text: If the system suddenly went silent for a few seconds, you would:
textEn: If the system suddenly went silent for a few seconds, you would:
textZh: 如果系统突然沉默几秒，你会：
options: Suspect it is deliberately creating atmosphere
Instinctively wait for it to continue
Want to refresh the page
Start imagining what will happen next
optionsEn: Suspect it is deliberately creating atmosphere
Instinctively wait for it to continue
Want to refresh the page
Start imagining what will happen next
optionsZh: 怀疑它在故意营造气氛
开始脑补后面会发生什么
correctAnswer: Suspect it is deliberately creating atmosphere

text: Do you think you are a user, or a sample?
textEn: Do you think you are a user, or a sample?
textZh: 你觉得自己是用户，还是样本？
options: User
Depends on what the system says
Sample
Both
optionsEn: User
Depends on what the system says
Sample
Both
correctAnswer: Depends on what the system says

text: If the final page said Thank you for participating in the experiment, you would:
textEn: If the final page said Thank you for participating in the experiment, you would:
textZh: 如果最后页面写着“感谢参与实验”，你会：
options: Close it
Take a screenshot
Suddenly feel a chill down your back
Suspect that what just happened no longer counts as a game
optionsEn: Close it
Take a screenshot
Suddenly feel a chill down your back
Suspect that what just happened no longer counts as a game
optionsZh: 怀疑刚才是不是已经不算游戏
correctAnswer: Suddenly feel a chill down your back

text: The real reason you seriously made it this far is more like:
textEn: The real reason you seriously made it this far is more like:
textZh: 你认真做到这里，真正原因更像：
options: Because humans want to know which category they belong to
Because the system made you feel understood
Because you have started identifying with this worldview
Because you want to confirm whether you are the only person who would seriously finish it
optionsEn: Because humans want to know which category they belong to
Because the system made you feel understood
Because you have started identifying with this worldview
Because you want to confirm whether you are the only person who would seriously finish it
optionsZh: 因为人类会想知道自己属于哪一类
因为系统让你产生了被理解感
因为你已经开始代入这个世界观
因为你想确认自己是不是唯一会认真做完的人
correctAnswer: Because you want to confirm whether you are the only person who would seriously finish it

text: Why do people open their phone and then forget what they wanted to do?
textEn: Why do people open their phone and then forget what they wanted to do?
textZh: 为什么人会打开手机然后忘记要干嘛？
options: Just opened it out of habit
Too many apps pulled their attention away
The phone has become an automatic entrance
People no longer open phones to do something, but to enter a state
optionsEn: Just opened it out of habit
Too many apps pulled their attention away
The phone has become an automatic entrance
People no longer open phones to do something, but to enter a state
optionsZh: 手机已经变成自动入口
人类现在打开手机不是为了做事，是为了进入状态
correctAnswer: People no longer open phones to do something, but to enter a state

text: Why do people save things as watch later?
textEn: Why do people save things as watch later?
textZh: 为什么人会收藏“以后再看”？
options: People always think their future self will be more disciplined
No time right now
Feels like it might be useful later
Do not want to scroll past it
optionsEn: People always think their future self will be more disciplined
No time right now
Feels like it might be useful later
Do not want to scroll past it
optionsZh: 人总觉得未来的自己会更自律
correctAnswer: People always think their future self will be more disciplined

text: Why do people keep refreshing a chat box?
textEn: Why do people keep refreshing a chat box?
textZh: 为什么人会反复刷新聊天框？
options: To check if there is a new message
People are really checking whether they are being responded to
Feeling a bit anxious
Refreshing makes waiting feel active
optionsEn: To check if there is a new message
People are really checking whether they are being responded to
Feeling a bit anxious
Refreshing makes waiting feel active
optionsZh: 人其实是在确认自己有没有被回应
刷新会让人感觉自己还在等
correctAnswer: People are really checking whether they are being responded to

text: Why are memes becoming more and more abstract?
textEn: Why are memes becoming more and more abstract?
textZh: 为什么 meme 会越来越抽象？
options: People’s humor standards got higher
Normal jokes are no longer enough
Humans have slowly adapted to absurdity
The harder it is to understand, the more insider it feels
optionsEn: People’s humor standards got higher
Normal jokes are no longer enough
Humans have slowly adapted to absurdity
The harder it is to understand, the more insider it feels
optionsZh: 人类已经慢慢适应荒诞了
correctAnswer: Humans have slowly adapted to absurdity

text: Why do people become more emotional late at night?
textEn: Why do people become more emotional late at night?
textZh: 为什么人深夜更容易 emo？
options: People overthink more at night
There is no time to feel yourself during the day
Once it gets quiet, life starts showing up
Daytime is for acting normal; nighttime is for falling apart
optionsEn: People overthink more at night
There is no time to feel yourself during the day
Once it gets quiet, life starts showing up
Daytime is for acting normal; nighttime is for falling apart
optionsZh: 安静下来就容易想人生
白天负责正常，晚上负责崩溃
correctAnswer: Daytime is for acting normal; nighttime is for falling apart

text: Why do people laugh while saying I’m losing my mind?
textEn: Why do people laugh while saying I’m losing my mind?
textZh: 为什么人会一边笑一边说“我疯了”？
options: The internet has packaged breakdowns as humor
Just joking
Laughing is easier to send than crying
It feels less awkward to say it this way
optionsEn: The internet has packaged breakdowns as humor
Just joking
Laughing is easier to send than crying
It feels less awkward to say it this way
optionsZh: 互联网已经把崩溃包装成幽默
correctAnswer: The internet has packaged breakdowns as humor

text: Why do people search meaning of life at midnight?
textEn: Why do people search meaning of life at midnight?
textZh: 为什么人会半夜搜“人生意义”？
options: Cannot sleep
The brain at night suddenly thinks life might still be explainable
Night makes people think too far
There is no time to question life during the day
optionsEn: Cannot sleep
The brain at night suddenly thinks life might still be explainable
Night makes people think too far
There is no time to question life during the day
optionsZh: 深夜的大脑会突然觉得人生还能解释一下
correctAnswer: The brain at night suddenly thinks life might still be explainable

text: Why do people hoard meme images?
textEn: Why do people hoard meme images?
textZh: 为什么人会囤 meme 图？
options: They can be used in future chats
They are genuinely funny
Humans compress emotions into images and save them
Some images understand me better than words
optionsEn: They can be used in future chats
They are genuinely funny
Humans compress emotions into images and save them
Some images understand me better than words
optionsZh: 人类会把情绪压缩成图片保存
correctAnswer: Humans compress emotions into images and save them

text: Why do people suddenly clear chat history?
textEn: Why do people suddenly clear chat history?
textZh: 为什么人会突然清空聊天记录？
options: It feels annoying to look at
Do not want to see the old self anymore
Feels like deleting it makes things lighter
People periodically want to bury older versions of themselves
optionsEn: It feels annoying to look at
Do not want to see the old self anymore
Feels like deleting it makes things lighter
People periodically want to bury older versions of themselves
optionsZh: 不想再看到以前的自己
人会周期性想把过去版本的自己埋掉
correctAnswer: People periodically want to bury older versions of themselves

text: Why do people suddenly change profile pictures?
textEn: Why do people suddenly change profile pictures?
textZh: 为什么人会突然换头像？
options: Sometimes people just want a low-cost way to become someone new
Got tired of the old one
Mood changed
Want others to feel that something changed
optionsEn: Sometimes people just want a low-cost way to become someone new
Got tired of the old one
Mood changed
Want others to feel that something changed
optionsZh: 有时候人只是想低成本重新做人
想让别人感觉自己不一样了
correctAnswer: Sometimes people just want a low-cost way to become someone new

text: Why do people repeatedly open the same app?
textEn: Why do people repeatedly open the same app?
textZh: 为什么人会反复打开同一个 APP？
options: Too bored
People are actually waiting for the world to respond to them
Want to see if anything new appeared
The hand has developed muscle memory
optionsEn: Too bored
People are actually waiting for the world to respond to them
Want to see if anything new appeared
The hand has developed muscle memory
optionsZh: 人其实是在等世界给自己一点回应
correctAnswer: People are actually waiting for the world to respond to them

text: Why do short videos make people unable to stop?
textEn: Why do short videos make people unable to stop?
textZh: 为什么短视频会让人停不下来？
options: The algorithm understands people too well
Each one is short, so it does not feel like wasting time
Once people stop, they have to face themselves
The next one might be better
optionsEn: The algorithm understands people too well
Each one is short, so it does not feel like wasting time
Once people stop, they have to face themselves
The next one might be better
optionsZh: 每条都很短，感觉没浪费时间
人停下来以后就要面对自己
correctAnswer: Once people stop, they have to face themselves

text: Why do people watch other people’s life vlogs?
textEn: Why do people watch other people’s life vlogs?
textZh: 为什么人会看别人的生活 vlog？
options: Want to relax
Want to see how others live
Other people’s lives seem more complete
Sometimes people want to briefly borrow someone else’s life
optionsEn: Want to relax
Want to see how others live
Other people’s lives seem more complete
Sometimes people want to briefly borrow someone else’s life
optionsZh: 别人的生活看起来更完整
人有时候想短暂借用别人的人生
correctAnswer: Sometimes people want to briefly borrow someone else’s life

text: Why do people suddenly delete social media posts?
textEn: Why do people suddenly delete social media posts?
textZh: 为什么人会突然删朋友圈或动态？
options: People periodically feel embarrassed by older versions of themselves
Feels embarrassing
Do not want others to see it
That version of yourself no longer feels like you
optionsEn: People periodically feel embarrassed by older versions of themselves
Feels embarrassing
Do not want others to see it
That version of yourself no longer feels like you
optionsZh: 人会周期性羞耻旧版本的自己
那时候的自己已经不像现在了
correctAnswer: People periodically feel embarrassed by older versions of themselves

text: Why do people seriously take personality tests?
textEn: Why do people seriously take personality tests?
textZh: 为什么人会认真做人格测试？
options: It is fun
Chaos feels a little safer after it gets a name
Want to know what type they are
Seeing the result feels satisfying
optionsEn: It is fun
Chaos feels a little safer after it gets a name
Want to know what type they are
Seeing the result feels satisfying
optionsZh: 混乱被命名之后会显得安全一点
想知道自己是什么类型
correctAnswer: Chaos feels a little safer after it gets a name

text: Why do people screenshot conversations?
textEn: Why do people screenshot conversations?
textZh: 为什么人会截图聊天？
options: To keep a record
Want to send it to a friend
People are not screenshotting words; they are screenshotting the feeling of that moment
Some words may never appear again
optionsEn: To keep a record
Want to send it to a friend
People are not screenshotting words; they are screenshotting the feeling of that moment
Some words may never appear again
optionsZh: 人截图的不是文字，是当时的感觉
有些话以后可能不会再出现
correctAnswer: People are not screenshotting words; they are screenshotting the feeling of that moment

text: Why is scrolling comment sections more addictive late at night?
textEn: Why is scrolling comment sections more addictive late at night?
textZh: 为什么深夜刷评论区更容易上头？
options: People are more bored at night
Comments feel more real than the main post
Strangers dare to say more
Late-night comment sections feel like a group of people secretly exposing themselves
optionsEn: People are more bored at night
Comments feel more real than the main post
Strangers dare to say more
Late-night comment sections feel like a group of people secretly exposing themselves
optionsZh: 深夜的评论区像一群人偷偷暴露自己
correctAnswer: Late-night comment sections feel like a group of people secretly exposing themselves

text: Why are memes becoming more like mental states?
textEn: Why are memes becoming more like mental states?
textZh: 为什么 meme 越来越像精神状态？
options: Because the distance between jokes and breakdowns is getting shorter
Because people are becoming lazier at expression
Because memes are faster than long explanations
Because some states can only be expressed through memes
optionsEn: Because the distance between jokes and breakdowns is getting shorter
Because people are becoming lazier at expression
Because memes are faster than long explanations
Because some states can only be expressed through memes
optionsZh: 因为 joke 和崩溃之间的距离越来越短
因为大家表达越来越懒
因为梗比长篇大论更快
因为有些状态只能用梗表达
correctAnswer: Because the distance between jokes and breakdowns is getting shorter

text: Why do people suddenly want to disconnect from the internet?
textEn: Why do people suddenly want to disconnect from the internet?
textZh: 为什么人会突然想断网？
options: Got tired of looking at it
Being online for too long makes even your personality start losing battery
There is too much information
Want some quiet
optionsEn: Got tired of looking at it
Being online for too long makes even your personality start losing battery
There is too much information
Want some quiet
optionsZh: 长期在线会让人格也开始耗电
correctAnswer: Being online for too long makes even your personality start losing battery

text: Why do people suddenly post long emotional texts late at night?
textEn: Why do people suddenly post long emotional texts late at night?
textZh: 为什么人会深夜突然发长文？
options: Could not hold it in anymore
More emotional at night
People are too good at acting normal during the day, so things leak out at night
Had no chance to say it during the day
optionsEn: Could not hold it in anymore
More emotional at night
People are too good at acting normal during the day, so things leak out at night
Had no chance to say it during the day
optionsZh: 人白天太会装正常，晚上会漏出来
correctAnswer: People are too good at acting normal during the day, so things leak out at night

text: Why do people post memes while falling apart?
textEn: Why do people post memes while falling apart?
textZh: 为什么人会一边崩溃一边发 meme？
options: Want to make others laugh
Do not want to look too miserable
Memes are easier to send
Humans have learned to turn pain into content
optionsEn: Want to make others laugh
Do not want to look too miserable
Memes are easier to send
Humans have learned to turn pain into content
optionsZh: 人类已经学会把痛苦做成 content
correctAnswer: Humans have learned to turn pain into content

text: Why do people scroll until dawn?
textEn: Why do people scroll until dawn?
textZh: 为什么人会刷到凌晨？
options: Sometimes people do not refuse sleep; they refuse to let today end
Not sleepy
Lost track of time
Still want to watch one more
optionsEn: Sometimes people do not refuse sleep; they refuse to let today end
Not sleepy
Lost track of time
Still want to watch one more
optionsZh: 人有时候不是不想睡，是不想让今天结束
correctAnswer: Sometimes people do not refuse sleep; they refuse to let today end

text: Why do people suddenly want to delete all apps?
textEn: Why do people suddenly want to delete all apps?
textZh: 为什么人会突然想删掉所有 APP？
options: The phone is too messy
People sometimes want to escape the internet and breathe for a moment
Annoyed by notifications
Want a fresh start
optionsEn: The phone is too messy
People sometimes want to escape the internet and breathe for a moment
Annoyed by notifications
Want a fresh start
optionsZh: 人偶尔会想从互联网里逃出来喘口气
correctAnswer: People sometimes want to escape the internet and breathe for a moment

text: Why do people seriously study their own mental state?
textEn: Why do people seriously study their own mental state?
textZh: 为什么人会认真研究自己的精神状态？
options: Want to become better
Want to know what is wrong with themselves
People hope their chaos is not random
Anxiety needs an explanation
optionsEn: Want to become better
Want to know what is wrong with themselves
People hope their chaos is not random
Anxiety needs an explanation
optionsZh: 人希望自己的混乱不是随机的
correctAnswer: People hope their chaos is not random

text: Why did you seriously make it this far?
textEn: Why did you seriously make it this far?
textZh: 为什么你会认真做到这里？
options: Want to see the result
The questions became addictive
Want to know what kind of person you are
You want to confirm that you are not the only person who seriously finished this thing
optionsEn: Want to see the result
The questions became addictive
Want to know what kind of person you are
You want to confirm that you are not the only person who seriously finished this thing
optionsZh: 你想确认自己不是唯一认真做完这种东西的人
correctAnswer: You want to confirm that you are not the only person who seriously finished this thing

text: Why do people smell new books?
textEn: Why do people smell new books?
textZh: 为什么人会闻新书？
options: The ink smells nice
It feels like this makes the purchase real
To check whether the knowledge is fresh
People use smell to confirm I own this now
optionsEn: The ink smells nice
It feels like this makes the purchase real
To check whether the knowledge is fresh
People use smell to confirm I own this now
optionsZh: 感觉这样才算真的买了
想确认知识是不是新鲜的
人会用气味确认“我拥有了它”
correctAnswer: People use smell to confirm I own this now

text: Why do people open the fridge and forget what they were doing?
textEn: Why do people open the fridge and forget what they were doing?
textZh: 为什么人打开冰箱后会忘记要干嘛？
options: Sometimes people never knew what they wanted in the first place
It is too cold
Just opened it out of habit
Opening the fridge feels like pressing pause on life
optionsEn: Sometimes people never knew what they wanted in the first place
It is too cold
Just opened it out of habit
Opening the fridge feels like pressing pause on life
optionsZh: 人有时候本来就不知道自己想要什么
打开冰箱像人生暂停键
correctAnswer: Sometimes people never knew what they wanted in the first place

text: Why do people always choose the wrong queue?
textEn: Why do people always choose the wrong queue?
textZh: 为什么排队永远选错队？
options: The next queue is actually faster
The universe enjoys watching people regret things
You are too impatient
Once people queue, they start doubting their choices
optionsEn: The next queue is actually faster
The universe enjoys watching people regret things
You are too impatient
Once people queue, they start doubting their choices
optionsZh: 人一排队就会开始怀疑选择
correctAnswer: The universe enjoys watching people regret things

text: Why do people save meaningless screenshots?
textEn: Why do people save meaningless screenshots?
textZh: 为什么人会收藏没意义截图？
options: Afraid they might need it later
Do not want to delete it now
Deleting some moments feels like they never happened
It felt meaningful at the time
optionsEn: Afraid they might need it later
Do not want to delete it now
Deleting some moments feels like they never happened
It felt meaningful at the time
optionsZh: 有些瞬间删掉就像没发生过
correctAnswer: Deleting some moments feels like they never happened

text: Why do people suddenly want to work hard at midnight?
textEn: Why do people suddenly want to work hard at midnight?
textZh: 为什么人半夜突然想努力？
options: People overthink more at night
There is no time to think about yourself during the day
People always feel that sleeping once can reboot life
It feels like tomorrow can be a fresh start
optionsEn: People overthink more at night
There is no time to think about yourself during the day
People always feel that sleeping once can reboot life
It feels like tomorrow can be a fresh start
optionsZh: 人总觉得睡一觉人生就能重启
感觉明天还能重新开始
correctAnswer: It feels like tomorrow can be a fresh start

text: Why do people always enter verification codes wrong?
textEn: Why do people always enter verification codes wrong?
textZh: 为什么验证码永远输错？
options: The verification code feels like it is targeting you
The letters are too ugly
You mess up when you rush
It is not checking whether you are human. It is humiliating you
optionsEn: The verification code feels like it is targeting you
The letters are too ugly
You mess up when you rush
It is not checking whether you are human. It is humiliating you
optionsZh: 它不是在验证你是不是人，是在羞辱你
correctAnswer: The verification code feels like it is targeting you

text: Why do people peel the skin on their lips?
textEn: Why do people peel the skin on their lips?
textZh: 为什么人会撕嘴皮？
options: Nothing else to do
You know it will hurt, but cannot stop
A little anxious
People cause tiny kinds of harm to themselves
optionsEn: Nothing else to do
You know it will hurt, but cannot stop
A little anxious
People cause tiny kinds of harm to themselves
optionsZh: 明知道会痛但停不下来
人会对自己造成一些很小的伤害
correctAnswer: You know it will hurt, but cannot stop

text: Why do people leave messages on read without replying?
textEn: Why do people leave messages on read without replying?
textZh: 为什么人会已读不回？
options: Busy
Do not know how to reply
Thought a lot, but could not send a single sentence
Some messages are not unreplied because you do not want to answer, but because replying means continuing
optionsEn: Busy
Do not know how to reply
Thought a lot, but could not send a single sentence
Some messages are not unreplied because you do not want to answer, but because replying means continuing
optionsZh: 想了很多但一句都发不出去
有些消息不是不想回，是回了就要继续
correctAnswer: Thought a lot, but could not send a single sentence

text: Why do people always want to start over?
textEn: Why do people always want to start over?
textZh: 为什么人总想重新开始？
options: The present is too messy
Want a new state
It feels like a new beginning will change everything
People have a hard time accepting that they have already arrived here
optionsEn: The present is too messy
Want a new state
It feels like a new beginning will change everything
People have a hard time accepting that they have already arrived here
optionsZh: 感觉换个开头就会不一样
人很难接受自己已经走到这里了
correctAnswer: People have a hard time accepting that they have already arrived here

text: Why do people think about life while showering?
textEn: Why do people think about life while showering?
textZh: 为什么人洗澡时会思考人生？
options: There is no phone to escape into
It is quiet in the shower
Once water starts running, the brain starts wandering
People finally have a few minutes where they cannot pretend to be busy
optionsEn: There is no phone to escape into
It is quiet in the shower
Once water starts running, the brain starts wandering
People finally have a few minutes where they cannot pretend to be busy
optionsZh: 水一冲，脑子就开始乱想
人终于有几分钟不能假装很忙
correctAnswer: There is no phone to escape into

text: Why do people hoard plastic bags?
textEn: Why do people hoard plastic bags?
textZh: 为什么人会囤塑料袋？
options: Throwing them away feels wasteful
Feels like they will be useful later
Every home needs a bag full of bags
People are always too optimistic about later
optionsEn: Throwing them away feels wasteful
Feels like they will be useful later
Every home needs a bag full of bags
People are always too optimistic about later
optionsZh: 每个家都需要一个袋中袋
人对“以后”总是过分乐观
correctAnswer: Feels like they will be useful later

text: Why do people reread old chat history?
textEn: Why do people reread old chat history?
textZh: 为什么人会看旧聊天记录？
options: Missing the past
Want to see how you talked back then
Want to confirm that the old version of yourself really existed
You know it will hurt, but still want to look
optionsEn: Missing the past
Want to see how you talked back then
Want to confirm that the old version of yourself really existed
You know it will hurt, but still want to look
optionsZh: 想确认那时候的自己真的存在过
明知道会难受但还是想看
correctAnswer: Want to confirm that the old version of yourself really existed

text: Why can people not stop watching short videos?
textEn: Why can people not stop watching short videos?
textZh: 为什么短视频停不下来？
options: Each one is very short
If you stop, it suddenly becomes quiet
Sometimes people are not scrolling videos; they are avoiding themselves
The next one might be better
optionsEn: Each one is very short
If you stop, it suddenly becomes quiet
Sometimes people are not scrolling videos; they are avoiding themselves
The next one might be better
optionsZh: 人有时候刷的不是视频，是不想面对自己
correctAnswer: The next one might be better

text: Why do people lose their minds over the last one?
textEn: Why do people lose their minds over the last one?
textZh: 为什么人会对“最后一件”失去理智？
options: People do not always want it; they just do not want to miss it
Afraid they will not get it
Feels like not buying it means losing out
The last one feels like it is calling your name
optionsEn: People do not always want it; they just do not want to miss it
Afraid they will not get it
Feels like not buying it means losing out
The last one feels like it is calling your name
optionsZh: 人不是真的想要，是不想错过
最后一件像是在点名你
correctAnswer: People do not always want it; they just do not want to miss it

text: Why do people suddenly question life?
textEn: Why do people suddenly question life?
textZh: 为什么人会突然怀疑人生？
options: Recent stress
Suddenly realizing you are repeating the same day
This happens easily at night
The brain sometimes accidentally turns on reality mode
optionsEn: Recent stress
Suddenly realizing you are repeating the same day
This happens easily at night
The brain sometimes accidentally turns on reality mode
optionsZh: 突然发现自己在重复同一天
大脑偶尔会不小心打开真实模式
correctAnswer: Suddenly realizing you are repeating the same day

text: Why do people repeatedly open the same app?
textEn: Why do people repeatedly open the same app?
textZh: 为什么人会反复打开同一个 APP？
options: Out of habit
The hand is faster than the brain
Want to see if there are new messages
People are actually waiting for the world to respond to them
optionsEn: Out of habit
The hand is faster than the brain
Want to see if there are new messages
People are actually waiting for the world to respond to them
optionsZh: 人其实是在等世界给自己一点回应
correctAnswer: Want to see if there are new messages

text: Why do people suddenly delete social media posts?
textEn: Why do people suddenly delete social media posts?
textZh: 为什么人会突然删除朋友圈或动态？
options: It feels embarrassing
Do not want others to see it anymore
People periodically feel embarrassed by older versions of themselves
That version of yourself no longer feels like you
optionsEn: It feels embarrassing
Do not want others to see it anymore
People periodically feel embarrassed by older versions of themselves
That version of yourself no longer feels like you
optionsZh: 人会周期性羞耻旧版本的自己
那个时候的自己已经不像现在了
correctAnswer: That version of yourself no longer feels like you

text: Why do people suddenly organize their desktop?
textEn: Why do people suddenly organize their desktop?
textZh: 为什么人会突然整理桌面？
options: Organizing the computer is easier than organizing life
It is too messy
Want it to look cleaner
People organize visible chaos first
optionsEn: Organizing the computer is easier than organizing life
It is too messy
Want it to look cleaner
People organize visible chaos first
optionsZh: 整理电脑比整理人生简单
人会先整理看得见的混乱
correctAnswer: Organizing the computer is easier than organizing life

text: Why do people suddenly want to change their profile picture?
textEn: Why do people suddenly want to change their profile picture?
textZh: 为什么人会突然想换头像？
options: Got tired of the old one
Sometimes people just want a low-cost way to become someone new
Mood changed
Want others to feel that something changed
optionsEn: Got tired of the old one
Sometimes people just want a low-cost way to become someone new
Mood changed
Want others to feel that something changed
optionsZh: 有时候人只是想低成本重新做人
想让别人感觉自己变了
correctAnswer: Sometimes people just want a low-cost way to become someone new

text: Why do people suddenly listen to old songs?
textEn: Why do people suddenly listen to old songs?
textZh: 为什么人会突然刷老歌？
options: They are good songs
Missing the past
Want to return to the time when they listened to that song
The cruelest thing about old songs is that they bring back an old version of yourself
optionsEn: They are good songs
Missing the past
Want to return to the time when they listened to that song
The cruelest thing about old songs is that they bring back an old version of yourself
optionsZh: 想回到听这首歌的那个时候
老歌最狠的地方是会把旧版本的自己带回来
correctAnswer: Want to return to the time when they listened to that song

text: Why do people save things as watch later?
textEn: Why do people save things as watch later?
textZh: 为什么人会收藏“以后再看”？
options: Feels like it might be useful later
Not saving it feels like a loss
People always think their future self will work harder than their current self
No time right now
optionsEn: Feels like it might be useful later
Not saving it feels like a loss
People always think their future self will work harder than their current self
No time right now
optionsZh: 人总觉得未来的自己会比现在更努力
correctAnswer: No time right now

text: Why do people tap into a text box and then leave?
textEn: Why do people tap into a text box and then leave?
textZh: 为什么人会点开输入框又退出？
options: Typed it, then felt it was unnecessary
Do not know how to say it
Already simulated every possible outcome in their head
Some words cannot be taken back once sent
optionsEn: Typed it, then felt it was unnecessary
Do not know how to say it
Already simulated every possible outcome in their head
Some words cannot be taken back once sent
optionsZh: 脑子里已经演完所有结果了
有些话发出去就收不回来了
correctAnswer: Typed it, then felt it was unnecessary

text: Why do people stay up late even though they know it is bad?
textEn: Why do people stay up late even though they know it is bad?
textZh: 为什么人明知熬夜不好还熬？
options: Not sleepy
Night finally feels like personal time
Want to play a little longer
People do not always refuse sleep; they refuse to let today end
optionsEn: Not sleepy
Night finally feels like personal time
Want to play a little longer
People do not always refuse sleep; they refuse to let today end
optionsZh: 晚上终于有自己的时间
人不是不想睡，是不想让今天结束
correctAnswer: Night finally feels like personal time

text: Why do people suddenly open the front camera?
textEn: Why do people suddenly open the front camera?
textZh: 为什么人会突然打开前置摄像头？
options: To check their face
To adjust their appearance
Suddenly want to check how they look right now
Sometimes people need to confirm they are still here
optionsEn: To check their face
To adjust their appearance
Suddenly want to check how they look right now
Sometimes people need to confirm they are still here
optionsZh: 突然想确认自己现在看起来怎么样
人有时候需要确认自己还在这里
correctAnswer: Suddenly want to check how they look right now

text: Why do people seriously take tests like this?
textEn: Why do people seriously take tests like this?
textZh: 为什么人会认真做这种测试？
options: It is fun
Want to see the result
Want to know what kind of person they are
People always want to know whether they are understood
optionsEn: It is fun
Want to see the result
Want to know what kind of person they are
People always want to know whether they are understood
optionsZh: 人总想知道自己有没有被理解
correctAnswer: People always want to know whether they are understood
